_doc: Strict-profile enforce mode (v0.27+). Restores pre-v0.27 hard blocking for ALL Stop gates. Use when ADR-006 / ADR-007 / feedback_exhaustive_analysis must be mechanically enforced (CI, audited runs). For day-to-day work prefer enforce_mode.example.json (warn-default) so the model isn't paralyzed by stacked Stop hooks. AGENT_TOOLKIT_STRICT=1 env var has the same effect as this file.
